Prototype Factions

Prototype 2: Factions - global multiplayer game

Prototype Factions is a mobile- and web-based game whereby points are scored, status gained, content unlocked and prizes won by checking in to physical locations via Facebook Places and through digital locations.

Visual design for mobile Facebook app, as well as information architecture and wireframing.
